result.stdout:
Description:
  Specification & Traceability

Usage:
  spectrace [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  extract  Group for extract commands
  merge    Merge & validate the provided requirements with test result execution.
  report   Generating reports (implementation report and test report) based on the merged requirements and test results.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Group for extract commands

Usage:
  spectrace extract [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  requirements  Extracting requirements and mapping to SpecTrace Requirement domain model.
  testresults   Extracting test results and mapping to SpecTrace Test Result domain model.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Group for extract commands

Usage:
  spectrace extract [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  requirements  Extracting requirements and mapping to SpecTrace Requirement domain model.
  testresults   Extracting test results and mapping to SpecTrace Test Result domain model.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Extracting requirements and mapping to SpecTrace Requirement domain model.

Usage:
  spectrace extract requirements [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)  Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)      Path to the file location.
  --pattern <pattern>           Support for asciidoc and markdown. Read the full documentation before modifying.
  --tags <tags>                 Tags hierarchy for requirement definitions. [default: URS/URS.AC|URS/DS/DS.AC|URS/FS/FS.AC]
  --context <context>           Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>             Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]
  -v, --verbose                 Increase logging verbosity. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Extracting test results and mapping to SpecTrace Test Result domain model.

Usage:
  spectrace extract testresults [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)           Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)               Path to the file location.
  --attachments-path <attachments-path>  Path to attachments. Supports globbing.
  --exclude-tags <exclude-tags>          Define tags to exclude from the report. [default: draft]
  --aggregator <Allure>                  Test result aggregator to parse executed test runs to SpecTrace domain models. [default: Allure]
  --check-testresults-exists             Fail if no test results could be found based on the provided path. [default: True]
  --check-attachments-exists             Fail if no test attachments could be found based on the provided path. [default: True]
  --context <context>                    Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>                      Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]
  -v, --verbose                          Increase logging verbosity. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Extracting test results and mapping to SpecTrace Test Result domain model.

Usage:
  spectrace extract testresults [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)           Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)               Path to the file location.
  --attachments-path <attachments-path>  Path to attachments. Supports globbing.
  --exclude-tags <exclude-tags>          Define tags to exclude from the report. [default: draft]
  --aggregator <Allure>                  Test result aggregator to parse executed test runs to SpecTrace domain models. [default: Allure]
  --check-testresults-exists             Fail if no test results could be found based on the provided path. [default: True]
  --check-attachments-exists             Fail if no test attachments could be found based on the provided path. [default: True]
  --context <context>                    Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>                      Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]
  -v, --verbose                          Increase logging verbosity. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Merge & validate the provided requirements with test result execution.

Usage:
  spectrace merge [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)                        Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  --requirements-path <requirements-path> (REQUIRED)  Path to SpecTrace extracted requirements. Supports globbing.
  --testresults-path <testresults-path> (REQUIRED)    Path to SpecTrace extracted test results. Supports globbing.
  --context <context>                                 Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>                                   Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]
  -v, --verbose                                       Increase logging verbosity. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)                        Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  --requirements-path <requirements-path> (REQUIRED)  Path to SpecTrace extracted requirements. Supports globbing.
  --testresults-path <testresults-path> (REQUIRED)    Path to SpecTrace extracted test results. Supports globbing.
  --context <context>                                 Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>                                   Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generating reports (implementation report and test report) based on the merged requirements and test results.

Usage:
  spectrace report [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)           Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  -s, --source <source>                  File path to the source data used as input to the report template.
  --attachments-path <attachments-path>  Path to attachments. Supports globbing.
  -t, --template <template> (REQUIRED)   Path to the liquid template, or built-in SpecTrace template reference. Read the documentation for more info.
  --params-file <params-file>            Path location to the SpecTrace params file.
  -p, --params <params>                  Additional params to be included in the report. Expected syntax: --meta status=draft
  --context <context>                    Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>                      Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]
  -v, --verbose                          Increase logging verbosity. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Options:
  -n, --name <name> (REQUIRED)           Name prefix to the file that will be generated as an output.
  -s, --source <source>                  File path to the source data used as input to the report template.
  --attachments-path <attachments-path>  Path to attachments. Supports globbing.
  -t, --template <template> (REQUIRED)   Path to the liquid template, or built-in SpecTrace template reference. Read the documentation for more info.
  --params-file <params-file>            Path location to the SpecTrace params file.
  -p, --params <params>                  Additional params to be included in the report. Expected syntax: --meta status=draft
  --context <context>                    Specifies the base directory. If not provided, the current directory is used as the base. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-novonordisk.spectrace-0.20.31-ff4c8e06363c425dac7d9165172b729f]
  -d, --dist <dist>                      Location for generated files to be stored. [default: dist]
  -v, --verbose                          Increase logging verbosity. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
